data: {"generalSituation":"An anticyclone aloft will cover the coast of Guangdong and the northern part of the South China Sea persistently in the next few days. The weather will be generally fine and become very hot over the region. Under the influence of a southerly airstream, there will be isolated showers over the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. With a trough of low pressure edging closer to the coast of southern China in the latter part of this week, the weather will become unsettled with showers and thunderstorms over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260525","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4, force 5 offshore and on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods. Hot during the day.
